How to Escape Backticks in Inline Markdown Code?
In markdown, inline code blocks are defined using backticks (i.e. `inline-code`), which makes it hard to render them within an inline code block. Find out how you can escape backticks in this case.

in 2 hours
How to Get the Last Digit of an Integer in Ruby?
Find out how you can get the last digit of an integer in Ruby using various different ways. Knowing different ways would allow you to choose the best one for your projects.
blog
3 days ago
How to Always Open macOS Text Editor in Plain Text Mode?
Find it how you can change the macOS Text Editor application settings to always open documents in plain text mode instead of rich text mode. This would preserve formatting of copy/pasted text.
blog
4 days ago
How to Negate a Number in Python?
Learn about different ways in which you can negate a number in Python (i.e. return a positive number if the original number is negative and return a negative number if the original number is positive).

2 days ago
How to Get the Last Digit of an Integer in PHP?
Find out how you can get the last digit of an integer in PHP using various different ways. Knowing different ways would allow you to choose the best one for your projects.
blog
3 days ago
How to Access "n-th" Element of a PHP Array With Mixed Keys?
Learn how you can access the "n-th" element of an array in PHP that has mixed keys (i.e. it has both, numeric and string keys), with an explanation on how you can do that in a safe way (such as when "n-th" offset exist).
blog
4 days ago
How to Always Return a Negative Number in Python?
Learn about different ways in which you can ensure that you always return a negative number in Python (regardless of whether the original number is positive or negative).

How to Get the Last Digit of an Integer in JavaScript?
Find out how you can get the last digit of an integer in JavaScript using various different ways. Knowing different ways would allow you to choose the best one for your projects.

3 days ago
What's the Math.sign() Alternative for BigInt Values in JavaScript?
The Math.sign() method in JavaScript only allows for numbers to be passed in as an argument. Find out how you can perform the same operation on JavaScript bigint values.
blog
7 days ago
How to Convert Positive Numbers to Negative in Python?
Learn about different ways in which you can convert a positive number (such as an integer, float, etc.) to a negative number in Python. Knowing this will help you quickly negate numbers in your Python code.

Find out how you can get the last digit of an integer in Python using various different ways. Knowing different ways would allow you to choose the best one for your projects.

How to Represent "Infinity" in PHP?
In certain mathematical calculations or operations you might have the requirement to represent infinity values (i.e. positive infinity or negative infinity) in your code. Find out how you can do that in PHP.
